程序包 view.Impl

package view.Impl
  • 相关程序包
    程序包
    说明
    view
     
  • 类
    类
    说明
    AccountBookUiImpl
    Implementation of the account book user interface, responsible for UI construction and interaction logic.
    AIAnalyzeUiImpl
    UI implementation for AI financial analysis, providing an interface to generate and view AI-driven budget reports.
    BaseUiImpl
    Base UI implementation for the account book application, providing core navigation and authentication views.
    ImportUiImpl
    UI implementation for importing/exporting financial data and managing entries in a table.
    ReportFormsUiImpl
    UI implementation for generating and displaying financial reports with charts (bar, line, pie).
    SettingUiImpl
    UI implementation for application settings, including financial data directory management and user profile editing.
